channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: How cellphone carriers prepare for hurricane season with AI, drones and 'cows'
item.description: Hurricane season is expected to be milder than usual this year. But that's not stopping cell phone companies from pulling out all the stops.

item.title: In photos: a preview of the Obama Presidential Center
item.description: The Obama Presidential Center opens later this month in Chicago. We take a look inside.

item.title: The $13 billion carrier with a plumbing problem is home. Now come the costly repairs
item.description: With 4,600 sailors finally home, USS Gerald R. Ford will finally receive some much needed repairs and an upgrade to its beleaguered sewage system.

item.title: Over a third of World Cup matches face dangerous heat risk, NPR analysis finds
item.description: Many 2026 World Cup venues could experience dangerously hot, humid weather. Our analysis identifies the matches most at risk.
